sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for NES port

special_mechanics.name: Ship Speed Upgrade
special_mechanics.description: Blue bell power-up increases player ship speed with up to five speed levels

special_mechanics.name: Two-Player Ship Alignment
special_mechanics.description: Player ships can align vertically or horizontally together to perform more powerful attacks

special_mechanics.name: Ship Damage System
special_mechanics.description: Player ship has two arms; bullets striking sides disable arms instead of instant death. Loss of both arms removes bomb ability until ambulance repair

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. TwinBee is a vertical scrolling shooter, not a platformer. Source documentation focuses on gameplay mechanics (power-ups, cooperative features, damage system) rather than physics parameters. No movement, gravity, or jump physics values documented.
